results.rendered_html: stavat mfn. (only in nom. sg. stavān; always applied to Indra and accord. to  Sāy. ;  RV. vi, 24, 8  = stūyamāna, ‘being praised’; accord. to others = stavas = tavas, fr. √stu for √1. tu, and meaning ‘strong, powerful’; others give it the sense ‘thundering’, fr. √stan),  RV.
